name: rl_w
comment: measured relative load rl (feeds KFMIOP load axis); produced by sub_D34DC

name: rl_scaled
comment: scaled rl form (load family, sub_D34DC). NOT coolant

name: rlsol_w
comment: relative-load setpoint (load request fed to LDR boost)

name: load_measured
comment: measured load / boost-actual (shared: LDR + charge model)

name: rk_w
comment: relative fuel mass rk (-> RKTI sub_775C8)

name: lambda_trim_nv
comment: persistent learned lambda trim, page 0xC2 (LRA; restored at boot)

name: catheat_mode
comment: catalyst-heating/warm-up mode flag (sub_52D16; read by spark reserve)

name: flags_torque_revlimit
comment: torque/load + rev-limit state flags (.2 = over-rev fuel cut)

name: flags_idle_state
comment: idle-state flags (.9 = LLR active; read by spark reserve)
